name: Veritate Tool SFT
description: Tool-use SFT trainer. Continues training a pretrained base model on a byte-level SFT .bin produced by experiments/v2/tool_sft/jsonl_to_bin.py from a JSONL of (prompt, tool_call, args, observation, answer) traces. Works with canonical Veritate or Veritate800M; the base ckpt picks the class. Defaults: LR 5e-5, WSD schedule with decay last 10%, 5k steps. Output: models/<base_stem>_toolsft/.
